# Item Durability - Arc Lib | DAQEM Studios

[Skip to main content](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/condition_types/items/item_durability#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

**Get 25% OFF** on your first order with **BisectHosting** using code "DAQEM"!

Get Discount

Learn More

On this page

The `arc:item_durability` condition type checks the durability of the item involved in the action.

Parameters[​](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/condition_types/items/item_durability#parameters "Direct link to Parameters")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Parameter | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `durability` | `double` | ✅Required | \-  | The durability value. |
| `comparison` | `ComparisonType` | ❌Optional | `==` | Comparison type. |
| `is_percentage` | `boolean` | ❌Optional | `false` | Is the value a percentage. |

Example[​](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/condition_types/items/item_durability#example "Direct link to Example")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The following example prevents using an item if it has less than 10 durability.

data/my\_datapack/arc/prevent\_break.json

    {    "holder": {        "type": "arc:player",        "id": "arc:player"    },    "type": "arc:on_use_item",    "conditions": [        {            "type": "arc:item_durability",            "durability": 10,            "comparison": "<"        }    ],    "rewards": [        {            "type": "arc:cancel_action"        },        {            "type": "arc:command",            "command": "tellraw %player% {\"text\":\"Item is too damaged!\",\"color\":\"red\"}"        }    ]}

Compatible Action Types[​](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/condition_types/items/item_durability#compatible-action-types "Direct link to Compatible Action Types")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[🧪 On Brew Potion\
-----------------\
\
The arc:onbrewpotion action type is triggered when a player brews a potion.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/players/on_brew_potion)

[🛠️ On Craft Item\
-----------------\
\
The arc:oncraftitem action type is triggered when a player crafts an item.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/items/on_craft_item)

[🥤 On Drink\
-----------\
\
The arc:on\_drink action type is triggered when a player drinks an item (e.g., potion, milk bucket, etc.).](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/players/on_drink)

[🪣 On Drop Item\
---------------\
\
The arc:ondropitem action type is triggered when a player drops an item.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/items/on_drop_item)

[🍽️ On Eat\
----------\
\
The arc:on\_eat action type is triggered when a player eats an item.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/players/on_eat)

[🪣 On Empty Bucket\
------------------\
\
The arc:onemptybucket action type is triggered when a player places a liquid or fish from a bucket.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/items/on_empty_bucket)

[✨ On Enchant Item\
-----------------\
\
The arc:onenchantitem action type is triggered when a player enchants an item.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/items/on_enchant_item)

[💧 On Fill Bucket\
-----------------\
\
The arc:onfillbucket action type is triggered when a player picks up a liquid or fish with a bucket.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/items/on_fill_bucket)

[🎣 On Fished Up Item\
--------------------\
\
The arc:onfishedup\_item action type is triggered when a player fishes up an item.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/items/on_fished_up_item)

[⚔️ On Get Attack Speed\
----------------------\
\
The arc:getattackspeed action type is used to retrieve the attack speed of a player.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/players/on_get_attack_speed)

[⚡ On Get Destroy Speed\
----------------------\
\
The arc:ongetdestroy\_speed action type is triggered when a player is determining how quickly they can break a block. This action type allows you to modify the destroy speed based on various conditions.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/blocks/on_get_destroy_speed)

[⚙️ On Grind Item\
----------------\
\
The arc:ongrinditem action type is triggered when a player grinds an item.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/items/on_grind_item)

[🗡️ On Hurt Item\
----------------\
\
The arc:onhurtitem action type is triggered when a player hurts/damages an item.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/items/on_hurt_item)

[🖱️ On Interact Block\
---------------------\
\
The arc:oninteractblock action type is triggered when a player interacts with a block, such as right-clicking it.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/blocks/on_interact_block)

[🖱️ On Interact Entity\
----------------------\
\
The arc:oninteractentity action type is triggered when a player interacts with an entity, such as right-clicking it.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/entities/on_interact_entity)

[💔 On Item Break\
----------------\
\
The arc:onitembreak action type is triggered when a tool or armor piece loses all durability and breaks.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/items/on_item_break)

[🤲 On Pickup Item\
-----------------\
\
The arc:onpickupitem action type is triggered when a player picks up an item from the ground.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/items/on_pickup_item)

[🏹 On Shoot Projectile\
----------------------\
\
The arc:onshootprojectile action type is triggered when a player shoots a projectile, such as an arrow or a snowball.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/players/on_shoot_projectile)

[🔥 On Smelt Item\
----------------\
\
The arc:onsmeltitem action type is triggered when a player takes an item out of a furnace, smoker, or blast furnace. Just like experience orbs in vanilla Minecraft, this action also counts the items that are taken out with a hopper. As long as the player takes out one of the smelted items, the action will be triggered. The action is called for every item smelted individually, regardless of how many are taken out at once.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/items/on_smelt_item)

[🪵 On Strip Log\
---------------\
\
The arc:onstriplog action type is triggered when a player strips a log or wood block using an axe.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/players/on_strip_log)

[🏹 On Throw Item\
----------------\
\
The arc:onthrowitem action type is triggered when a player throws an item (e.g. snowball, egg, ender pearl).](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/items/on_throw_item)

[🌿 On Till Soil\
---------------\
\
The arc:ontillsoil action type is triggered when a player uses a hoe on a dirt-like block to create farmland.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/blocks/on_till_soil)

[🤝 On Trade With Villager\
-------------------------\
\
The arc:ontradewith\_villager action type is triggered when a player successfully completes a trade with a Villager or Wandering Trader.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/entities/on_trade_with_villager)

[⚒️ On Use Anvil\
---------------\
\
The arc:onuseanvil action type is triggered when a player uses an anvil to repair or rename an item.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/players/on_use_anvil)

[🖱️ On Use Item\
---------------\
\
The arc:onuseitem action type is triggered when a player uses an item (right-clicks with an item).](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/items/on_use_item)

*   [Parameters](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/condition_types/items/item_durability#parameters)

# Health - Arc Lib | DAQEM Studios

[Skip to main content](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/condition_types/players/health#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

**Get 25% OFF** on your first order with **BisectHosting** using code "DAQEM"!

Get Discount

Learn More

On this page

The `arc:health` condition type checks the player's current health.

Parameters[​](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/condition_types/players/health#parameters "Direct link to Parameters")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Parameter | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `health` | `double` | ✅Required | \-  | Health value. |
| `comparison` | `ComparisonType` | ❌Optional | `==` | Comparison type. |
| `is_percentage` | `boolean` | ❌Optional | `false` | Is the value a percentage. |

Example[​](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/condition_types/players/health#example "Direct link to Example")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The following example gives resistance when the player falls below 30% health.

data/my\_datapack/arc/low\_health\_resist.json

    {    "holder": {        "type": "arc:player",        "id": "arc:player"    },    "type": "arc:on_get_hurt",    "conditions": [        {            "type": "arc:health",            "health": 30,            "comparison": "<",            "is_percentage": true        }    ],    "rewards": [        {            "type": "arc:effect",            "effect": {                "id": "minecraft:resistance",                "duration": 200,                "amplifier": 1            }        }    ]}

Compatible Action Types[​](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/condition_types/players/health#compatible-action-types "Direct link to Compatible Action Types")

The arc:ontradewith\_villager action type is triggered when a player successfully completes a trade with a Villager or Wandering Trader.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/entities/on_trade_with_villager)

---------------\
\

---------------\
\
The arc:onuseitem action type is triggered when a player uses an item (right-clicks with an item).](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/items/on_use_item)

-------------\
\
The arc:on\_walk action type is triggered when a player is walking.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/movement/on_walk)

# Freeze Entity - Arc Lib | DAQEM Studios

[Skip to main content](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/reward_types/entities/freeze_entity#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

**Get 25% OFF** on your first order with **BisectHosting** using code "DAQEM"!

Get Discount

Learn More

On this page

The `arc:freeze_entity` reward type applies a freezing effect (Slowness) to the target entity.

Parameters[​](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/reward_types/entities/freeze_entity#parameters "Direct link to Parameters")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Parameter | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `duration` | `int` | ❌Optional | `100` | Ticks to apply slowness. |

Example[​](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/reward_types/entities/freeze_entity#example "Direct link to Example")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The following example freezes an entity for 5 seconds when hitting it with a snowball.

data/my\_datapack/arc/snowball\_freeze.json

    {    "holder": {        "type": "arc:player",        "id": "arc:player"    },    "type": "arc:on_hurt_entity",    "conditions": [        {            "type": "arc:damage_source",            "direct_entity_type": "minecraft:snowball"        }    ],    "rewards": [        {            "type": "arc:freeze_entity",            "duration": 100        }    ]}

Compatible Action Types[​](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/reward_types/entities/freeze_entity#compatible-action-types "Direct link to Compatible Action Types")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Play Sound - Arc Lib | DAQEM Studios

[Skip to main content](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/reward_types/world/play_sound#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

**Get 25% OFF** on your first order with **BisectHosting** using code "DAQEM"!

Get Discount

Learn More

On this page

The `arc:play_sound` reward type plays a specific sound event at a target location.

Parameters[​](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/reward_types/world/play_sound#parameters "Direct link to Parameters")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Parameter | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `sound` | `SoundEvent` | ✅Required | \-No default value | The sound event to play. |
| `volume` | `float` | ❌Optional | `1` | Volume. |
| `pitch` | `float` | ❌Optional | `1` | Pitch. |
| `position` | `ArcPositionTarget` | ❌Optional | `PLAYER` | Position to play sound. |
| `sound_source` | `SoundSource` | ❌Optional | `PLAYERS` | Source category. |

Example[​](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/reward_types/world/play_sound#example "Direct link to Example")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The following example plays a level-up sound when the player gains experience.

data/my\_datapack/arc/ding.json

    {    "holder": {        "type": "arc:player",        "id": "arc:player"    },    "type": "arc:on_pickup_item",    "conditions": [        {            "type": "arc:entity_type",            "entity_type": "minecraft:experience_orb"        }    ],    "rewards": [        {            "type": "arc:play_sound",            "sound": "minecraft:entity.player.levelup",            "volume": 0.5,            "pitch": 1.0,            "position": "PLAYER",            "sound_source": "PLAYERS"        }    ]}

Compatible Action Types[​](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/reward_types/world/play_sound#compatible-action-types "Direct link to Compatible Action Types")

[🔥 On Smelt Item\
----------------\
\
The arc:onsmeltitem action type is triggered when a player takes an item out of a furnace, smoker, or blast furnace. Just like experience orbs in vanilla Minecraft, this action also counts the items that are taken out with a hopper. As long as the player takes out one of the smelted items, the action will be triggered. The action is called for every item smelted individually, regardless of how many are taken out at once.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/items/on_smelt_item)

----------------\

The arc:launch\_player reward type applies a velocity vector to the player, launching them in a direction.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/reward_types/players/launch_player)

# Biome - Arc Lib | DAQEM Studios

[Skip to main content](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/condition_types/world/biome#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

**Get 25% OFF** on your first order with **BisectHosting** using code "DAQEM"!

Get Discount

Learn More

On this page

The `arc:biome` condition type checks if the player is in one of the specified biomes.

Parameters[​](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/condition_types/world/biome#parameters "Direct link to Parameters")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Parameter | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `biomes` | `Identifier[]` | ✅Required | \-  | List of biomes to check. |

Example[​](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/condition_types/world/biome#example "Direct link to Example")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The following example gives regeneration when standing in a desert.

data/my\_datapack/arc/desert\_regen.json

    {    "holder": {        "type": "arc:player",        "id": "arc:player"    },    "type": "arc:on_walk",    "conditions": [        {            "type": "arc:biome",            "biomes": [                "minecraft:desert"            ]        }    ],    "rewards": [        {            "type": "arc:effect",            "effect": {                "id": "minecraft:regeneration",                "duration": 20            }        }    ]}

Compatible Action Types[​](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/condition_types/world/biome#compatible-action-types "Direct link to Compatible Action Types")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[🏆 On Advancement\
-----------------\
\
The arc:on\_advancement action type is triggered when a player receives an advancement.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/advancements/on_advancement)

[🛡️ On Block With Shield\
------------------------\
\
The arc:onblockwith\_shield action type is triggered when a player successfully blocks damage using a shield.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/players/on_block_with_shield)

[⛏️ On Break Block\
-----------------\
\
The arc:onbreakblock action type is triggered when a player breaks a block.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/blocks/on_break_block)

[🐑 On Breed Animal\
------------------\
\
The arc:onbreedanimal action type is triggered when a player breeds two animals.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/entities/on_breed_animal)

[🧪 On Brew Potion\
-----------------\
\
The arc:onbrewpotion action type is triggered when a player brews a potion.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/players/on_brew_potion)

[🌌 On Change Dimension\
----------------------\
\
The arc:onchangedimension action type is triggered when a player travels between dimensions.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/players/on_change_dimension)

[🛠️ On Craft Item\
-----------------\
\
The arc:oncraftitem action type is triggered when a player crafts an item.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/items/on_craft_item)

[🦶 On Crouch\
------------\
\
The arc:on\_crouch action type is triggered when a player crouches (sneaks).](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/movement/on_crouch)

[💀 On Death\
-----------\
\
The arc:on\_death action type is triggered when the player dies.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/players/on_death)

[🥤 On Drink\
-----------\
\
The arc:on\_drink action type is triggered when a player drinks an item (e.g., potion, milk bucket, etc.).](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/players/on_drink)

[🪣 On Drop Item\
---------------\
\
The arc:ondropitem action type is triggered when a player drops an item.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/items/on_drop_item)

[🍽️ On Eat\
----------\
\
The arc:on\_eat action type is triggered when a player eats an item.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/players/on_eat)

[💉 On Effect Added\
------------------\
\
The arc:onaddeffect action type is triggered when a player receives a potion effect.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/players/on_add_effect)

[🪂 On Elytra Fly\
----------------\
\
The arc:onelytrafly action type is triggered when a player is flying with an elytra.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/movement/on_elytra_fly)

[🪣 On Empty Bucket\
------------------\
\
The arc:onemptybucket action type is triggered when a player places a liquid or fish from a bucket.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/items/on_empty_bucket)

[✨ On Enchant Item\
-----------------\
\
The arc:onenchantitem action type is triggered when a player enchants an item.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/items/on_enchant_item)

[💧 On Fill Bucket\
-----------------\
\
The arc:onfillbucket action type is triggered when a player picks up a liquid or fish with a bucket.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/items/on_fill_bucket)

[🎣 On Fished Up Item\
--------------------\
\
The arc:onfishedup\_item action type is triggered when a player fishes up an item.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/items/on_fished_up_item)

[⚔️ On Get Attack Speed\
----------------------\
\
The arc:getattackspeed action type is used to retrieve the attack speed of a player.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/players/on_get_attack_speed)

[⚡ On Get Destroy Speed\
----------------------\
\
The arc:ongetdestroy\_speed action type is triggered when a player is determining how quickly they can break a block. This action type allows you to modify the destroy speed based on various conditions.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/blocks/on_get_destroy_speed)

[🤕 On Get Hurt\
--------------\
\
The arc:ongethurt action type is triggered when a player takes damage.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/players/on_get_hurt)

[⚙️ On Grind Item\
----------------\
\
The arc:ongrinditem action type is triggered when a player grinds an item.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/items/on_grind_item)

[🌾 On Harvest Crop\
------------------\
\
The arc:onharvestcrop action type is triggered when a player harvests a crop.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/blocks/on_harvest_crop)

[🐎 On Horse Ride\
----------------\
\
The arc:onhorseride action type is triggered when a player is riding a horse.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/movement/on_horse_ride)

[🗡️ On Hurt Entity\
------------------\
\
The arc:onhurtentity action type is triggered when a player hurts an entity.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/entities/on_hurt_entity)

[🗡️ On Hurt Item\
----------------\
\
The arc:onhurtitem action type is triggered when a player hurts/damages an item.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/items/on_hurt_item)

[🩸 On Hurt Player\
-----------------\
\
The arc:onhurtplayer action type is triggered when a player hurts another player.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/players/on_hurt_player)

[🖱️ On Interact Block\
---------------------\
\
The arc:oninteractblock action type is triggered when a player interacts with a block, such as right-clicking it.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/blocks/on_interact_block)

[🖱️ On Interact Entity\
----------------------\
\
The arc:oninteractentity action type is triggered when a player interacts with an entity, such as right-clicking it.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/entities/on_interact_entity)

[💔 On Item Break\
----------------\
\
The arc:onitembreak action type is triggered when a tool or armor piece loses all durability and breaks.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/items/on_item_break)

[🦘 On Jump\
----------\
\
The arc:on\_jump action type is triggered when a player jumps.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/movement/on_jump)

[💀 On Kill Entity\
-----------------\
\
The arc:onkillentity action type is triggered when a player kills an entity.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/entities/on_kill_entity)

[⬇️ On Land\
----------\
\
The arc:on\_land action type is triggered when a player lands on the ground after falling or jumping.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/movement/on_land)

[🤲 On Pickup Item\
-----------------\
\
The arc:onpickupitem action type is triggered when a player picks up an item from the ground.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/items/on_pickup_item)

[🧱 On Place Block\
-----------------\
\
The arc:onplaceblock action type is triggered when a player places a block.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/blocks/on_place_block)

[🌱 On Plant Crop\
----------------\
\
The arc:onplantcrop action type is triggered when a player plants a crop.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/blocks/on_plant_crop)

[🎣 On Rod Reel In\
-----------------\
\
The arc:onrodreel\_in action type is triggered when a player reels in a fishing rod.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/players/on_rod_reel_in)

[🏹 On Shoot Projectile\
----------------------\
\
The arc:onshootprojectile action type is triggered when a player shoots a projectile, such as an arrow or a snowball.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/players/on_shoot_projectile)

[🔥 On Smelt Item\
----------------\
\
The arc:onsmeltitem action type is triggered when a player takes an item out of a furnace, smoker, or blast furnace. Just like experience orbs in vanilla Minecraft, this action also counts the items that are taken out with a hopper. As long as the player takes out one of the smelted items, the action will be triggered. The action is called for every item smelted individually, regardless of how many are taken out at once.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/items/on_smelt_item)

[🏃‍♂️ On Sprint\
---------------\
\
The arc:on\_sprint action type is triggered when a player is sprinting.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/movement/on_sprint)

---------------------\
\
The arc:oncrouchstart action type is triggered when a player starts crouching (sneaking).](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/movement/on_crouch_start)

[🪂 On Start Elytra Flying\
-------------------------\
\
The arc:onelytrafly\_start action type is triggered when a player starts flying with an elytra.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/movement/on_elytra_fly_start)

[🐎 On Start Horse Riding\
------------------------\
\
The arc:onhorseride\_start action type is triggered when a player starts riding a horse.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/movement/on_horse_ride_start)

------------------------\
\
The arc:onsprintstart action type is triggered when a player starts sprinting.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/movement/on_sprint_start)

-----------------------\
\

\

\
The arc:onelytrafly\_stop action type is triggered when a player stops flying with an elytra.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/movement/on_elytra_fly_stop)

-----------------------\
\
The arc:onhorseride\_stop action type is triggered when a player stops riding a horse.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/movement/on_horse_ride_stop)

-----------------------\
\
The arc:onsprintstop action type is triggered when a player stops sprinting.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/movement/on_sprint_stop)

----------------------\
\

[🚶‍♂️ On Stop Walking\
---------------------\
\
The arc:onwalkstop action type is triggered when a player stops walking.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/movement/on_walk_stop)

[🪵 On Strip Log\
---------------\
\
The arc:onstriplog action type is triggered when a player strips a log or wood block using an axe.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/players/on_strip_log)

[🏊‍♂️ On Swim\
-------------\
\
The arc:on\_swim action type is triggered when a player is swimming.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/movement/on_swim)

[🐾 On Tame Animal\
-----------------\
\
The arc:ontameanimal action type is triggered when a player tames an animal.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/entities/on_tame_animal)

[🏹 On Throw Item\
----------------\
\
The arc:onthrowitem action type is triggered when a player throws an item (e.g. snowball, egg, ender pearl).](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/items/on_throw_item)

[🌿 On Till Soil\
---------------\
\
The arc:ontillsoil action type is triggered when a player uses a hoe on a dirt-like block to create farmland.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/blocks/on_till_soil)

[🤝 On Trade With Villager\
-------------------------\
\
The arc:ontradewith\_villager action type is triggered when a player successfully completes a trade with a Villager or Wandering Trader.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/entities/on_trade_with_villager)

[⚒️ On Use Anvil\
---------------\
\
The arc:onuseanvil action type is triggered when a player uses an anvil to repair or rename an item.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/players/on_use_anvil)

[🖱️ On Use Item\
---------------\
\
The arc:onuseitem action type is triggered when a player uses an item (right-clicks with an item).](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/items/on_use_item)

[🚶‍♂️ On Walk\
-------------\
\
The arc:on\_walk action type is triggered when a player is walking.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/movement/on_walk)

# Weather - Arc Lib | DAQEM Studios

[Skip to main content](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/condition_types/world/weather#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

**Get 25% OFF** on your first order with **BisectHosting** using code "DAQEM"!

Get Discount

Learn More

On this page

The `arc:weather` condition type checks the current weather in the world.

Parameters[​](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/condition_types/world/weather#parameters "Direct link to Parameters")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Parameter | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `weather` | `ArcWeatherType` | ✅Required | \-  | CLEAR, RAIN, or THUNDER. |

Example[​](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/condition_types/world/weather#example "Direct link to Example")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The following example gives speed when it is thundering.

data/my\_datapack/arc/thunder\_speed.json

    {    "holder": {        "type": "arc:player",        "id": "arc:player"    },    "type": "arc:on_walk",    "conditions": [        {            "type": "arc:weather",            "weather": "THUNDER"        }    ],    "rewards": [        {            "type": "arc:effect",            "effect": {                "id": "minecraft:speed",                "duration": 40            }        }    ]}

Compatible Action Types[​](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/condition_types/world/weather#compatible-action-types "Direct link to Compatible Action Types")

# Damage Multiplier - Arc Lib | DAQEM Studios

[Skip to main content](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/reward_types/entities/damage_multiplier#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

**Get 25% OFF** on your first order with **BisectHosting** using code "DAQEM"!

Get Discount

Learn More

On this page

The `arc:damage_multiplier` reward type multiplies the amount of damage dealt or received.

Parameters[​](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/reward_types/entities/damage_multiplier#parameters "Direct link to Parameters")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Parameter | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `multiplier` | `double` | ✅Required | \-No default value | The multiplier for the damage. |

Example[​](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/reward_types/entities/damage_multiplier#example "Direct link to Example")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The following example will cause the player to deal double damage to other players.

data/my\_datapack/arc/pvp\_strength.json

    {    "holder": {        "type": "arc:player",        "id": "arc:player"    },    "type": "arc:on_hurt_player",    "rewards": [        {            "type": "arc:damage_multiplier",            "multiplier": 2.0        }    ]}## Compatible Action Types<CompatibleActionTypes />

*   [Parameters](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/reward_types/entities/damage_multiplier#parameters)
    
*   [Example](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/reward_types/entities/damage_multiplier#example)

---

# Repair Held Item - Arc Lib | DAQEM Studios

[Skip to main content](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/reward_types/items/repair_held_item#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

**Get 25% OFF** on your first order with **BisectHosting** using code "DAQEM"!

Get Discount

Learn More

On this page

The `arc:repair_held_item` reward type repairs the item held in a specific hand.

Parameters[​](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/reward_types/items/repair_held_item#parameters "Direct link to Parameters")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Parameter | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `amount` | `int` | ✅Required | \-No default value | Amount to repair. |
| `is_percentage` | `boolean` | ❌Optional | `false` | Is amount a percentage. |
| `hand` | `InteractionHand` | ❌Optional | `MAIN_HAND` | Hand to repair. |

Example[​](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/reward_types/items/repair_held_item#example "Direct link to Example")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The following example repairs the main hand item by 5% when breaking a block.

data/my\_datapack/arc/tool\_maintenance.json

    {    "holder": {        "type": "arc:player",        "id": "arc:player"    },    "type": "arc:on_break_block",    "rewards": [        {            "type": "arc:repair_held_item",            "amount": 5,            "is_percentage": true,            "hand": "MAIN_HAND"        }    ]}

Compatible Action Types[​](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/reward_types/items/repair_held_item#compatible-action-types "Direct link to Compatible Action Types")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[🔥 On Smelt Item\
----------------\
\
The arc:onsmeltitem action type is triggered when a player takes an item out of a furnace, smoker, or blast furnace. Just like experience orbs in vanilla Minecraft, this action also counts the items that are taken out with a hopper. As long as the player takes out one of the smelted items, the action will be triggered. The action is called for every item smelted individually, regardless of how many are taken out at once.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/items/on_smelt_item)

# Smelt Inventory - Arc Lib | DAQEM Studios

[Skip to main content](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/reward_types/items/smelt_inventory#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

**Get 25% OFF** on your first order with **BisectHosting** using code "DAQEM"!

Get Discount

Learn More

On this page

The `arc:smelt_inventory` reward type smelts all smeltable items currently in the player's inventory.

Parameters[​](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/reward_types/items/smelt_inventory#parameters "Direct link to Parameters")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Parameter | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `recipes` | `Identifier[]` | ❌Optional | \-No default value | Specific recipes to allow. |

Example[​](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/reward_types/items/smelt_inventory#example "Direct link to Example")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The following example smelts the player's inventory when they step into lava.

data/my\_datapack/arc/super\_heat.json

    {    "holder": {        "type": "arc:player",        "id": "arc:player"    },    "type": "arc:on_get_hurt",    "conditions": [        {            "type": "arc:damage_source",            "source": "lava"        }    ],    "rewards": [        {            "type": "arc:smelt_inventory"        }    ]}

\

----------------------\
\
The arc:ongetdestroy\_speed action type is triggered when a player is determining how quickly they can break a block. This action type allows you to modify the destroy speed based on various conditions.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/blocks/on_get_destroy_speed)

[💔 On Item Break\
----------------\
\
The arc:onitembreak action type is triggered when a tool or armor piece loses all durability and breaks.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/items/on_item_break)

----------\
\
The arc:on\_jump action type is triggered when a player jumps.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/movement/on_jump)

The arc:onkillentity action type is triggered when a player kills an entity.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/entities/on_kill_entity)

-----------------\
\
The arc:onpickupitem action type is triggered when a player picks up an item from the ground.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/items/on_pickup_item)

-----------------\
\
The arc:onplaceblock action type is triggered when a player places a block.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/blocks/on_place_block)

The arc:onplantcrop action type is triggered when a player plants a crop.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/blocks/on_plant_crop)

----------------------\
\
The arc:onshootprojectile action type is triggered when a player shoots a projectile, such as an arrow or a snowball.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/players/on_shoot_projectile)

[🔥 On Smelt Item\
----------------\
\
The arc:onsmeltitem action type is triggered when a player takes an item out of a furnace, smoker, or blast furnace. Just like experience orbs in vanilla Minecraft, this action also counts the items that are taken out with a hopper. As long as the player takes out one of the smelted items, the action will be triggered. The action is called for every item smelted individually, regardless of how many are taken out at once.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/items/on_smelt_item)

[🏃‍♂️ On Sprint\
---------------\
\
The arc:on\_sprint action type is triggered when a player is sprinting.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/movement/on_sprint)

\
The arc:ontillsoil action type is triggered when a player uses a hoe on a dirt-like block to create farmland.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/blocks/on_till_soil)

-------------------------\
\

# Items - Arc Lib | DAQEM Studios

[Skip to main content](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/reward_types/items#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

**Get 25% OFF** on your first order with **BisectHosting** using code "DAQEM"!

Get Discount

Learn More

[🪙 Drop Item\
------------\
\
The arc:drop\_item reward type drops an item at the location of the action (e.g., where a block was broken).](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/reward_types/items/drop_item)

[✨ Enchant Item\
--------------\
\
The arc:enchant\_item reward type applies enchantments to an item in a specific slot.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/reward_types/items/enchant_item)

[🪙 Item\
-------\
\
The arc:item reward type gives an item to the player.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/reward_types/items/item)

[🛡️🔧 Repair All Armor\
----------------------\
\
The arc:repairallarmor reward type repairs all equipped armor items.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/reward_types/items/repair_all_armor)

[🔧 Repair Held Item\
-------------------\
\
The arc:repairhelditem reward type repairs the item held in a specific hand.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/reward_types/items/repair_held_item)

[🔥🎒 Smelt Inventory\
--------------------\
\
The arc:smelt\_inventory reward type smelts all smeltable items currently in the player's inventory.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/reward_types/items/smelt_inventory)

# Distance - Arc Lib | DAQEM Studios

[Skip to main content](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/condition_types/movement/distance#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

**Get 25% OFF** on your first order with **BisectHosting** using code "DAQEM"!

Get Discount

Learn More

On this page

The `arc:distance` condition type checks if the player has traveled a certain distance while performing a continuous movement action (e.g., walking, swimming, sprinting).

Parameters[​](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/condition_types/movement/distance#parameters "Direct link to Parameters")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Parameter | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `distance_in_blocks` | `int` | ✅Required | \-  | The distance in blocks. |

Example[​](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/condition_types/movement/distance#example "Direct link to Example")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The following example will give the player an experience point every 100 blocks they walk.

data/my\_datapack/arc/xp\_for\_walking.json

    {    "holder": {        "type": "arc:player",        "id": "arc:player"    },    "type": "arc:on_walk",    "conditions": [        {            "type": "arc:distance",            "distance_in_blocks": 100        }    ],    "rewards": [        {            "type": "arc:exp",            "min": 1,            "max": 1        }    ]}

Compatible Action Types[​](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/condition_types/movement/distance#compatible-action-types "Direct link to Compatible Action Types")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[🦶 On Crouch\
------------\
\
The arc:on\_crouch action type is triggered when a player crouches (sneaks).](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/movement/on_crouch)

[🪂 On Elytra Fly\
----------------\
\
The arc:onelytrafly action type is triggered when a player is flying with an elytra.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/movement/on_elytra_fly)

[🐎 On Horse Ride\
----------------\
\
The arc:onhorseride action type is triggered when a player is riding a horse.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/movement/on_horse_ride)

[🏃‍♂️ On Sprint\
---------------\
\
The arc:on\_sprint action type is triggered when a player is sprinting.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/movement/on_sprint)

[🏊‍♂️ On Swim\
-------------\
\
The arc:on\_swim action type is triggered when a player is swimming.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/movement/on_swim)

[🚶‍♂️ On Walk\
-------------\
\
The arc:on\_walk action type is triggered when a player is walking.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/movement/on_walk)

*   [Parameters](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/condition_types/movement/distance#parameters)
    
*   [Example](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/condition_types/movement/distance#example)

# On Fire - Arc Lib | DAQEM Studios

[Skip to main content](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/condition_types/players/on_fire#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

**Get 25% OFF** on your first order with **BisectHosting** using code "DAQEM"!

Get Discount

Learn More

On this page

The `arc:on_fire` condition type checks if the player is currently on fire.

Parameters[​](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/condition_types/players/on_fire#parameters "Direct link to Parameters")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

This condition type does not have any parameters.

Example[​](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/condition_types/players/on_fire#example "Direct link to Example")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The following example grants fire resistance if the player catches fire.

data/my\_datapack/arc/auto\_extinguish.json

    {    "holder": {        "type": "arc:player",        "id": "arc:player"    },    "type": "arc:on_get_hurt",    "conditions": [        {            "type": "arc:on_fire"        }    ],    "rewards": [        {            "type": "arc:effect",            "effect": {                "id": "minecraft:fire_resistance",                "duration": 200            }        }    ]}

Compatible Action Types[​](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/condition_types/players/on_fire#compatible-action-types "Direct link to Compatible Action Types")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[🏆 On Advancement\
-----------------\
\

Just like experience orbs in vanilla Minecraft, this action also counts the items that are taken out with a hopper. As long as the player takes out one of the smelted items, the action will be triggered. The action is called for every item smelted individually, regardless of how many are taken out at once.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/items/on_smelt_item)

[🏃‍♂️ On Sprint\
---------------\
\
The arc:on\_sprint action type is triggered when a player is sprinting.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/movement/on_sprint)

# Spawn Entity - Arc Lib | DAQEM Studios

[Skip to main content](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/reward_types/entities/spawn_entity#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

**Get 25% OFF** on your first order with **BisectHosting** using code "DAQEM"!

Get Discount

Learn More

On this page

The `arc:spawn_entity` reward type spawns a specified entity near the player.

Parameters[​](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/reward_types/entities/spawn_entity#parameters "Direct link to Parameters")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Parameter | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `entity_type` | `EntityType` | ✅Required | \-No default value | Type of entity to spawn. |
| `count` | `int` | ❌Optional | `1` | Number of entities. |

Example[​](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/reward_types/entities/spawn_entity#example "Direct link to Example")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The following example spawns a zombie when a player breaks a grave stone (custom block example).

data/my\_datapack/arc/zombie\_trap.json

    {    "holder": {        "type": "arc:player",        "id": "arc:player"    },    "type": "arc:on_break_block",    "conditions": [        {            "type": "arc:block",            "block": "minecraft:stone"        }    ],    "rewards": [        {            "type": "arc:spawn_entity",            "entity_type": "minecraft:zombie",            "count": 1        }    ]}

Compatible Action Types[​](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/reward_types/entities/spawn_entity#compatible-action-types "Direct link to Compatible Action Types")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Is Riding - Arc Lib | DAQEM Studios

[Skip to main content](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/condition_types/movement/is_riding#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

**Get 25% OFF** on your first order with **BisectHosting** using code "DAQEM"!

Get Discount

Learn More

On this page

The `arc:is_riding` condition type checks if the player is currently riding an entity (horse, boat, minecart, etc.).

Parameters[​](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/condition_types/movement/is_riding#parameters "Direct link to Parameters")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

This condition type does not have any parameters.

Example[​](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/condition_types/movement/is_riding#example "Direct link to Example")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The following example gives speed when shooting a projectile while riding.

data/my\_datapack/arc/mounted\_archery.json

    {    "holder": {        "type": "arc:player",        "id": "arc:player"    },    "type": "arc:on_shoot_projectile",    "conditions": [        {            "type": "arc:is_riding"        }    ],    "rewards": [        {            "type": "arc:effect",            "effect": {                "id": "minecraft:speed",                "duration": 100            }        }    ]}

Compatible Action Types[​](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/condition_types/movement/is_riding#compatible-action-types "Direct link to Compatible Action Types")

----------------------\
\
The arc:getattackspeed action type is used to retrieve the attack speed of a player.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/players/on_get_attack_speed)

[⚡ On Get Destroy Speed\
----------------------\
\
The arc:ongetdestroy\_speed action type is triggered when a player is determining how quickly they can break a block. This action type allows you to modify the destroy speed based on various conditions.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/blocks/on_get_destroy_speed)

--------------\
\
The arc:ongethurt action type is triggered when a player takes damage.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/players/on_get_hurt)

-----------------\
\
The arc:onhurtplayer action type is triggered when a player hurts another player.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/players/on_hurt_player)

---------------------\
\
The arc:oninteractblock action type is triggered when a player interacts with a block, such as right-clicking it.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/blocks/on_interact_block)

[🖱️ On Interact Entity\
----------------------\
\
The arc:oninteractentity action type is triggered when a player interacts with an entity, such as right-clicking it.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/entities/on_interact_entity)

[💔 On Item Break\
----------------\
\
The arc:onitembreak action type is triggered when a tool or armor piece loses all durability and breaks.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/items/on_item_break)

[🦘 On Jump\
----------\
\
The arc:on\_jump action type is triggered when a player jumps.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/movement/on_jump)

-----------------\
\
The arc:onkillentity action type is triggered when a player kills an entity.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/entities/on_kill_entity)

----------\
\
The arc:on\_land action type is triggered when a player lands on the ground after falling or jumping.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/movement/on_land)

[🤲 On Pickup Item\
-----------------\
\
The arc:onpickupitem action type is triggered when a player picks up an item from the ground.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/items/on_pickup_item)

[🧱 On Place Block\
-----------------\
\
The arc:onplaceblock action type is triggered when a player places a block.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/blocks/on_place_block)

[🌱 On Plant Crop\
----------------\
\
The arc:onplantcrop action type is triggered when a player plants a crop.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/blocks/on_plant_crop)

-----------------\
\
The arc:onrodreel\_in action type is triggered when a player reels in a fishing rod.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/players/on_rod_reel_in)

[🏹 On Shoot Projectile\
----------------------\
\
The arc:onshootprojectile action type is triggered when a player shoots a projectile, such as an arrow or a snowball.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/players/on_shoot_projectile)

[🔥 On Smelt Item\
----------------\
\
The arc:onsmeltitem action type is triggered when a player takes an item out of a furnace, smoker, or blast furnace. Just like experience orbs in vanilla Minecraft, this action also counts the items that are taken out with a hopper. As long as the player takes out one of the smelted items, the action will be triggered. The action is called for every item smelted individually, regardless of how many are taken out at once.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/items/on_smelt_item)

---------------\
\
The arc:on\_sprint action type is triggered when a player is sprinting.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/movement/on_sprint)

-----------------\
\
The arc:ontameanimal action type is triggered when a player tames an animal.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/entities/on_tame_animal)

[🏹 On Throw Item\
----------------\
\
The arc:onthrowitem action type is triggered when a player throws an item (e.g. snowball, egg, ender pearl).](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/items/on_throw_item)

[🌿 On Till Soil\
---------------\
\
The arc:ontillsoil action type is triggered when a player uses a hoe on a dirt-like block to create farmland.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/blocks/on_till_soil)

[🤝 On Trade With Villager\
-------------------------\
\
The arc:ontradewith\_villager action type is triggered when a player successfully completes a trade with a Villager or Wandering Trader.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/entities/on_trade_with_villager)

[⚒️ On Use Anvil\
---------------\
\

---------------\
\
The arc:onuseitem action type is triggered when a player uses an item (right-clicks with an item).](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/items/on_use_item)

-------------\
\
The arc:on\_walk action type is triggered when a player is walking.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/movement/on_walk)

# Give Recipes - Arc Lib | DAQEM Studios

[Skip to main content](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/reward_types/players/give_recipes#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

**Get 25% OFF** on your first order with **BisectHosting** using code "DAQEM"!

Get Discount

Learn More

On this page

The `arc:give_recipes` reward type unlocks specific crafting recipes for the player.

Parameters[​](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/reward_types/players/give_recipes#parameters "Direct link to Parameters")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Parameter | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `recipes` | `Identifier[]` | ✅Required | \-No default value | Recipes to unlock. |

Example[​](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/reward_types/players/give_recipes#example "Direct link to Example")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The following example unlocks the iron pickaxe recipe when obtaining an iron ingot.

data/my\_datapack/arc/unlock\_iron.json

    {    "holder": {        "type": "arc:player",        "id": "arc:player"    },    "type": "arc:on_pickup_item",    "conditions": [        {            "type": "arc:item",            "item": "minecraft:iron_ingot"        }    ],    "rewards": [        {            "type": "arc:give_recipes",            "recipes": ["minecraft:iron_pickaxe"]        }    ]}

Compatible Action Types[​](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/reward_types/players/give_recipes#compatible-action-types "Direct link to Compatible Action Types")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[🏆 On Advancement\
-----------------\
\

[🖱️ On Use Item\
---------------\
\
The arc:onuseitem action type is triggered when a player uses an item (right-clicks with an item).](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/items/on_use_item)

-------------\
\
The arc:on\_walk action type is triggered when a player is walking.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/movement/on_walk)

# Item In Inventory - Arc Lib | DAQEM Studios

[Skip to main content](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/condition_types/items/item_in_inventory#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

**Get 25% OFF** on your first order with **BisectHosting** using code "DAQEM"!

Get Discount

Learn More

On this page

The `arc:item_in_inventory` condition type checks if the player has a specific item anywhere in their main inventory.

Parameters[​](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/condition_types/items/item_in_inventory#parameters "Direct link to Parameters")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Parameter | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `item` | [`ItemStack`](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/json_formats/#item) | ✅Required | \-  | The item to check. |

Example[​](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/condition_types/items/item_in_inventory#example "Direct link to Example")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The following example gives the player a diamond if they craft something while having a crafting table in their inventory.

data/my\_datapack/arc/crafting\_bench\_bonus.json

    {    "holder": {        "type": "arc:player",        "id": "arc:player"    },    "type": "arc:on_craft_item",    "conditions": [        {            "type": "arc:item_in_inventory",            "item": { "id": "minecraft:crafting_table" }        }    ],    "rewards": [        {            "type": "arc:item",            "item": { "id": "minecraft:diamond" }        }    ]}

[🔥 On Smelt Item\
----------------\
\
The arc:onsmeltitem action type is triggered when a player takes an item out of a furnace, smoker, or blast furnace. Just like experience orbs in vanilla Minecraft, this action also counts the items that are taken out with a hopper. As long as the player takes out one of the smelted items, the action will be triggered. The action is called for every item smelted individually, regardless of how many are taken out at once.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/items/on_smelt_item)

# Set Block - Arc Lib | DAQEM Studios

[Skip to main content](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/reward_types/blocks/set_block#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

**Get 25% OFF** on your first order with **BisectHosting** using code "DAQEM"!

Get Discount

Learn More

On this page

The `arc:set_block` reward type places a specific block at a target location.

Parameters[​](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/reward_types/blocks/set_block#parameters "Direct link to Parameters")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Parameter | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `block` | `ArcBlockState` | ✅Required | \-No default value | The block state to place. |
| `target` | `ArcPositionTarget` | ❌Optional | `BLOCK` | The target position (PLAYER, BLOCK, ENTITY). |
| `place_as_player` | `boolean` | ❌Optional | `true` | Whether to simulate player placement. |

Example[​](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/reward_types/blocks/set_block#example "Direct link to Example")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The following example turns the block under the player into ice when they walk.

data/my\_datapack/arc/frost\_walker.json

    {    "holder": {        "type": "arc:player",        "id": "arc:player"    },    "type": "arc:on_walk",    "rewards": [        {            "type": "arc:set_block",            "block": "minecraft:ice",            "target": "PLAYER",            "place_as_player": false        }    ]}

----------------\
\
The arc:onplantcrop action type is triggered when a player plants a crop.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/blocks/on_plant_crop)

[🎣 On Rod Reel In\
-----------------\
\
The arc:onrodreel\_in action type is triggered when a player reels in a fishing rod.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/players/on_rod_reel_in)

[🏹 On Shoot Projectile\
----------------------\
\
The arc:onshootprojectile action type is triggered when a player shoots a projectile, such as an arrow or a snowball.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/players/on_shoot_projectile)

[🔥 On Smelt Item\
----------------\
\
The arc:onsmeltitem action type is triggered when a player takes an item out of a furnace, smoker, or blast furnace. Just like experience orbs in vanilla Minecraft, this action also counts the items that are taken out with a hopper. As long as the player takes out one of the smelted items, the action will be triggered. The action is called for every item smelted individually, regardless of how many are taken out at once.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/items/on_smelt_item)

---------------\
\
The arc:on\_sprint action type is triggered when a player is sprinting.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/movement/on_sprint)

# Inventory Empty - Arc Lib | DAQEM Studios

[Skip to main content](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/condition_types/items/inventory_empty#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

**Get 25% OFF** on your first order with **BisectHosting** using code "DAQEM"!

Get Discount

Learn More

On this page

The `arc:inventory_empty` condition type checks if the player's inventory is completely empty.

Parameters[​](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/condition_types/items/inventory_empty#parameters "Direct link to Parameters")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

This condition type does not have any parameters.

Example[​](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/condition_types/items/inventory_empty#example "Direct link to Example")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The following example gives a starter kit if the inventory is empty on join (simulated).

data/my\_datapack/arc/starter\_kit.json

    {    "holder": {        "type": "arc:player",        "id": "arc:player"    },    "type": "arc:on_advancement",    "conditions": [        {            "type": "arc:inventory_empty"        }    ],    "rewards": [        {            "type": "arc:item",            "item": "minecraft:wooden_sword"        }    ]}

Compatible Action Types[​](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/condition_types/items/inventory_empty#compatible-action-types "Direct link to Compatible Action Types")

# Food Level - Arc Lib | DAQEM Studios

[Skip to main content](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/condition_types/players/food_level#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

**Get 25% OFF** on your first order with **BisectHosting** using code "DAQEM"!

Get Discount

Learn More

On this page

The `arc:food_level` condition type checks the player's current food level (0-20).

Parameters[​](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/condition_types/players/food_level#parameters "Direct link to Parameters")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Parameter | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `food_level` | `int` | ✅Required | \-  | Food level value. |
| `comparison` | `ComparisonType` | ❌Optional | `==` | Comparison type. |

Example[​](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/condition_types/players/food_level#example "Direct link to Example")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The following example gives regeneration if the player's food level is below 6 (3 shanks).

data/my\_datapack/arc/starving\_regen.json

    {    "holder": {        "type": "arc:player",        "id": "arc:player"    },    "type": "arc:on_walk",    "conditions": [        {            "type": "arc:food_level",            "food_level": 6,            "comparison": "<"        }    ],    "rewards": [        {            "type": "arc:effect",            "effect": {                "id": "minecraft:regeneration",                "duration": 40            }        }    ]}

Compatible Action Types[​](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/condition_types/players/food_level#compatible-action-types "Direct link to Compatible Action Types")

----------------------\
\

\

-----------------\
\
The arc:onpickupitem action type is triggered when a player picks up an item from the ground.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/items/on_pickup_item)

\
The arc:onplaceblock action type is triggered when a player places a block.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/blocks/on_place_block)

\
The arc:onplantcrop action type is triggered when a player plants a crop.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/blocks/on_plant_crop)

----------------------\
\
The arc:onshootprojectile action type is triggered when a player shoots a projectile, such as an arrow or a snowball.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/players/on_shoot_projectile)

[🔥 On Smelt Item\
----------------\
\
The arc:onsmeltitem action type is triggered when a player takes an item out of a furnace, smoker, or blast furnace. Just like experience orbs in vanilla Minecraft, this action also counts the items that are taken out with a hopper. As long as the player takes out one of the smelted items, the action will be triggered. The action is called for every item smelted individually, regardless of how many are taken out at once.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/items/on_smelt_item)

\
The arc:on\_sprint action type is triggered when a player is sprinting.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/movement/on_sprint)

# Is Blocking - Arc Lib | DAQEM Studios

[Skip to main content](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/condition_types/players/is_blocking#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

**Get 25% OFF** on your first order with **BisectHosting** using code "DAQEM"!

Get Discount

Learn More

On this page

The `arc:is_blocking` condition type checks if the player is currently using a shield.

Parameters[​](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/condition_types/players/is_blocking#parameters "Direct link to Parameters")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

This condition type does not have any parameters.

Example[​](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/condition_types/players/is_blocking#example "Direct link to Example")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The following example prevents knockback if the player is blocking.

data/my\_datapack/arc/steady\_stance.json

    {    "holder": {        "type": "arc:player",        "id": "arc:player"    },    "type": "arc:on_get_hurt",    "conditions": [        {            "type": "arc:is_blocking"        }    ],    "rewards": [        {            "type": "arc:effect",            "effect": {                "id": "minecraft:knockback_resistance",                "duration": 20,                "amplifier": 0            }        }    ]}

Compatible Action Types[​](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/condition_types/players/is_blocking#compatible-action-types "Direct link to Compatible Action Types")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

\
The arc:ontameanimal action type is triggered when a player tames an animal.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/entities/on_tame_animal)

[🏹 On Throw Item\
----------------\
\
The arc:onthrowitem action type is triggered when a player throws an item (e.g. snowball, egg, ender pearl).](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/items/on_throw_item)

[🌿 On Till Soil\
---------------\
\
The arc:ontillsoil action type is triggered when a player uses a hoe on a dirt-like block to create farmland.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/blocks/on_till_soil)

[🤝 On Trade With Villager\
-------------------------\
\
The arc:ontradewith\_villager action type is triggered when a player successfully completes a trade with a Villager or Wandering Trader.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/entities/on_trade_with_villager)

[⚒️ On Use Anvil\
---------------\
\
The arc:onuseanvil action type is triggered when a player uses an anvil to repair or rename an item.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/players/on_use_anvil)

[🖱️ On Use Item\
---------------\
\
The arc:onuseitem action type is triggered when a player uses an item (right-clicks with an item).](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/items/on_use_item)

[🚶‍♂️ On Walk\
-------------\
\
The arc:on\_walk action type is triggered when a player is walking.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/movement/on_walk)

*   [Parameters](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/condition_types/players/is_blocking#parameters)
    
*   [Example](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/condition_types/players/is_blocking#example)
    
*   [Compatible Action Types](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/condition_types/players/is_blocking#compatible-action-types)

# Or - Arc Lib | DAQEM Studios

[Skip to main content](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/condition_types/or#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

**Get 25% OFF** on your first order with **BisectHosting** using code "DAQEM"!

Get Discount

Learn More

On this page

The `arc:or` condition type is met if at least one of its nested conditions is met.

Parameters[​](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/condition_types/or#parameters "Direct link to Parameters")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Parameter | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `conditions` | [`Condition[]`](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/conditions) | ✅Required | \-  | A list of conditions to check. |

Example[​](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/condition_types/or#example "Direct link to Example")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The following example will reward the player with a diamond if they break either a stone block or a dirt block.

data/my\_datapack/arc/diamond\_for\_stone\_or\_dirt.json

    {    "holder": {        "type": "arc:player",        "id": "arc:player"    },    "type": "arc:on_break_block",    "conditions": [        {            "type": "arc:or",            "conditions": [                {                    "type": "arc:block",                    "block": "minecraft:stone"                },                {                    "type": "arc:block",                    "block": "minecraft:dirt"                }            ]        }    ],    "rewards": [        {            "type": "arc:item",            "item": {                "id": "minecraft:diamond"            }        }    ]}

Compatible Action Types[​](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/condition_types/or#compatible-action-types "Direct link to Compatible Action Types")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[🏆 On Advancement\
-----------------\
\
The arc:on\_advancement action type is triggered when a player receives an advancement.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/advancements/on_advancement)

------------------------\
\
The arc:onblockwith\_shield action type is triggered when a player successfully blocks damage using a shield.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/players/on_block_with_shield)

-----------------\
\
The arc:onbreakblock action type is triggered when a player breaks a block.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/blocks/on_break_block)

------------------\
\
The arc:onbreedanimal action type is triggered when a player breeds two animals.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/entities/on_breed_animal)

-----------------\
\
The arc:onbrewpotion action type is triggered when a player brews a potion.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/players/on_brew_potion)

----------------------\

The arc:onchangedimension action type is triggered when a player travels between dimensions.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/players/on_change_dimension)

The arc:oncraftitem action type is triggered when a player crafts an item.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/items/on_craft_item)

\
The arc:on\_death action type is triggered when the player dies.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/players/on_death)

-----------\
\
The arc:on\_drink action type is triggered when a player drinks an item (e.g., potion, milk bucket, etc.).](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/players/on_drink)

\
The arc:ondropitem action type is triggered when a player drops an item.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/items/on_drop_item)

----------------------\
\
The arc:getattackspeed action type is used to retrieve the attack speed of a player.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/players/on_get_attack_speed)

----------------------\
\
The arc:ongetdestroy\_speed action type is triggered when a player is determining how quickly they can break a block. This action type allows you to modify the destroy speed based on various conditions.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/blocks/on_get_destroy_speed)

-----------------\
\
The arc:onpickupitem action type is triggered when a player picks up an item from the ground.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/items/on_pickup_item)

The arc:onplaceblock action type is triggered when a player places a block.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/blocks/on_place_block)

----------------------\

The arc:onshootprojectile action type is triggered when a player shoots a projectile, such as an arrow or a snowball.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/players/on_shoot_projectile)

[🔥 On Smelt Item\
----------------\
\
The arc:onsmeltitem action type is triggered when a player takes an item out of a furnace, smoker, or blast furnace. Just like experience orbs in vanilla Minecraft, this action also counts the items that are taken out with a hopper. As long as the player takes out one of the smelted items, the action will be triggered. The action is called for every item smelted individually, regardless of how many are taken out at once.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/items/on_smelt_item)

---------------\
\
The arc:on\_sprint action type is triggered when a player is sprinting.](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/action_types/movement/on_sprint)

# Items - Arc Lib | DAQEM Studios

[Skip to main content](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/condition_types/items/items#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

**Get 25% OFF** on your first order with **BisectHosting** using code "DAQEM"!

Get Discount

Learn More

On this page

The `arc:items` condition type checks if an item is one of several specified items or belongs to a specified item tag.

Parameters[​](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/condition_types/items/items#parameters "Direct link to Parameters")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Parameter | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `items` | `string[]` | ✅Required | \-  | The items/item tags to check. |

Example[​](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/condition_types/items/items#example "Direct link to Example")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The following example rewards the player with an extra diamond when they smelt any item from the `#forge:ores` tag.

data/my\_datapack/arc/extra\_diamond\_from\_ores.json

    {    "holder": {        "type": "arc:player",        "id": "arc:player"    },    "type": "arc:on_smelt_item",    "conditions": [        {            "type": "arc:items",            "items": ["#forge:ores"]        }    ],    "rewards": [        {            "type": "arc:item",            "item": { "id": "minecraft:diamond" }        }    ]}

Compatible Action Types[​](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/condition_types/items/items#compatible-action-types "Direct link to Compatible Action Types")

# Item - Arc Lib | DAQEM Studios

[Skip to main content](https://daqem.com/projects/arc/wiki/condition_types/items/item#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)
